lines.en_lit: an egg-bulk is required a sukka. If it should enter your mind volume of the large date that they spoke of is larger than an egg-bulk, Now, two dates without their pits are not an egg. can the volume of a large date and its pit greater than that of an egg-bulk? Rav Yirmeya said: Yes, two dates without their pits are not equal an egg-bulk, the volume of a large date and its pit are larger than an egg-bulk, Rav Pappa said: This that people say: two kav of dates one kav and more of pits,

Rava said: There, this is the reasoning due to are fruit, and fruit need not a sukka raises an objection. Rabbi said: When we would learn Torah with Rabbi Elazar ben Shamua, they brought before us figs and grapes, and we ate them as a casual meal outside of the sukka. a casual meal, yes, a fixed meal not say we ate them as if a casual meal, outside of the sukka,
If you wish, say We ate as a fixed meal, and we ate bread as a casual meal with outside of the sukka.

Let us say that supports Therefore, if one completed with types of sweets, he has fulfilled If it should enter your mind fruit required a sukka, let it teach fruit. What types of sweets fruit. And if you wish, say a place where fruits are uncommon,
Rav Zevid said: the volume of a large date that they spoke is less than an egg-bulk, as we learned Beit Shammai say: leaven, the volume of an olive-bulk leavened bread is the volume of a large date.

And we discussed it: What is the reason of Beit Shammai? let the Merciful One write “Leavened bread,” and not need “Leaven.” I would say, If leavened bread, whose leavening ability is strong, is prohibited an olive-bulk, all the more so not leaven, whose leavening ability is strong the Merciful One distinguishes them taught you the measure for one is not the measure for the other. leaven an olive-bulk, leavened bread, volume of a large date.

And if it should enter your mind The volume of the large date that they spoke is greater than an egg-bulk, since Beit Shammai are searching for the measure larger than an olive-bulk, let them teach an egg-bulk Alternatively, if they are the same they should have taught an egg-bulk, Rather, not conclude from here that the volume of a large date is less than an egg-bulk?
From where Perhaps I could actually say to you the volume of a large date that they said is larger than an egg-bulk; normal an egg-bulk, Alternatively, that are equal, and chose one of them.

Rather, from here: How much to obligate an invitation zimmun] An olive-bulk the words of Rabbi Meir. Rabbi Yehuda says: An egg-bulk With regard to what do they disagree? Rabbi Meir holds “And you shall eat”; this eating. “And be satisfied”; this drinking. eating an olive-bulk. Rabbi Yehuda holds: “And you shall eat and be satisfied” eating that causes satisfaction, and what is that? an egg-bulk.

And if it should enter your mind the volume of the large date that they spoke is larger than an egg-bulk, Now an egg-bulk satisfies, it does not settle the mind, Rather, not conclude from the volume of a large date that they said is less than the size of an egg-bulk? of an egg-bulk satisfies the volume of a large date settles his mind.
